_provenance.signature_normalization: C# explicitly emits low-S; the executable Node fixture records the pinned upstream PureJS s value and its low-S equivalent.
_provenance.note: Random-k upstream runtimes are not byte-comparable. For the deterministic PureJS path, compatibility is asserted through stamp shape, identical r, the s ↔ (n - s) relationship, and verification under the same public key.
_provenance.assertion_strategy: ApiKeyStamperTests checks JSON property order, scheme, public key, RFC 6979 determinism, DER validity, low-S normalization, and cryptographic verification.

stampShape.stamp_test_assertion: Decode base64url -> JSON.parse; keys equal ['publicKey', 'scheme', 'signature']; publicKey == fixture.publicKey; scheme == SIGNATURE_SCHEME_TK_API_P256; signature verifies as DER ECDSA against SHA-256(message) under the fixture public key.
